title: An Act to Prohibit Certain Provisions in Health Care Provider Contracts with Insurance Carriers
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
last_house_action: 6/10/2025 - Reports READ . On motion of Representative MATHIESON of Kittery, the Majority Ought Not to Pass Report was ACCEPTED . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH. Placed in the Legislative Files. ( DEAD )
last_senate_action: 6/9/2025 - Reports READ. On motion by Senator BAILEY of York The Majority Ought Not To Pass Report ACCEPTED Sent down for concurrence

actions.description: Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Reports READ. On motion by Senator BAILEY of York The Majority Ought Not To Pass Report ACCEPTED Sent down for concurrence
